overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a neon-lit bar interior, ascending stairs past a guard, and exiting into a sunlit urban alleyway with cyberpunk architecture, steam vents, and large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar interior with neon lighting and counter service

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar past the teal counter and red booth seating

notable_agents.action: bartender working behind the counter preparing drinks

entered.detail: curved teal bar counter with neon green trim and bottles displayed behind
large red rectangular sign with white 'CIRKUS' text and star logo
suspended television screen showing a news broadcast
upholstered red booth seating along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a dimly lit cyberpunk bar with teal and red neon accents. The curved bar counter dominates the left side while red booth seating lines the right, with a large 'CIRKUS' sign visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar dining area with booth seating and wall murals

events.description: approaching the back stairs of the bar, leaving the main counter area

agents.ego_description: moving through the dining area toward the rear stairwell

notable_agents.action: patrons sitting at a dining table in the back area

entered.detail: wooden dining tables with chairs scattered throughout the back area
hanging green cylindrical pendant lights illuminating the space
large wall painting of a skull with crown and crossbones motif

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the bar, the scene shifts to a dining area with green pendant lights and skull-themed wall murals. The player passes patrons seated at tables while approaching a metal staircase at the back.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell with graffiti art and industrial metal stairs

events.description: ascending metal stairs toward the upper exit level
encountering an armed guard standing at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the metal stairs and approaching the guard near the exit

notable_agents.action: armed guard standing at the top of the stairs checking a handheld device

entered.detail: industrial metal staircase with grated steps and railings
large yellow graffiti text reading 'EL PADRE SABE' on the back wall
painted mural of a skull wearing a crown with red cross

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a narrow industrial stairwell adorned with graffiti reading 'EL PADRE SABE' and skull murals. An armed guard stands at the landing near the exit doors, temporarily blocking the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar exit doorway with bright exterior light streaming in

events.description: exiting the dark interior into bright midday sunlight causing lens flare
transitioning from indoor bar to outdoor urban alleyway

agents.ego_description: pushing through the metal exit doors into the bright alley outside

entered.detail: double metal exit doors with small rectangular windows showing bright light outside
intense sunlight streaming through the doorway creating high contrast

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the metal exit doors where intense midday sunlight streams through the windows. Pushing through the doors, the scene transitions dramatically from the dark neon interior to a bright outdoor alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban alleyway under concrete overpass with market stalls

events.description: emerging from bar into sunlit alley with steam vents and urban decay

agents.ego_description: walking through the alley passing by food vendors and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside food cart with large umbrella
pedestrian ascending stairs in the distance

entered.detail: two-story yellow building with multiple windows and awnings
massive concrete overpass structure casting shadows over the alley
street food cart with large blue and white umbrella
large concrete blocks placed in the alleyway

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a sunlit urban alley beneath a massive concrete overpass. The environment features a yellow building on the right, concrete barriers, and a food vendor with an umbrella. Steam rises from vents as pedestrians walk through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley opening into wider urban space with digital billboards

events.description: alley widens into open area with large digital billboards and advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrowing alley toward the billboard area

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete block near the alley stairs

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertising screens showing product advertisements
steam rising from a vent in the alley floor
red neon sign with '18+' text indicating age restriction
piles of garbage bags and debris along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The alley narrows and opens into a wider urban space dominated by large digital billboards. Steam vents emit fog near a red '18+' neon sign, while trash bags line the walls. The concrete overpass remains visible to the left as the player approaches the billboard area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the moody, neon-lit interior of a cyberpunk bar into the blinding brightness of a sun-drenched urban alley. It begins by gliding past a curved bar counter and red booths under teal accents, moving deeper into a dining area characterized by green pendant lights and skull murals. The camera then ascends a graffiti-covered industrial stairwell, passing an armed guard before approaching metal exit doors where intense midday light begins to bleed through the glass. As the doors swing open, the scene transitions dramatically from the dark interior to a bright outdoor space beneath a concrete overpass, featuring a yellow building and steam rising from street vents. The movement finally carries the viewer through the narrowing alley toward a wider plaza dominated by massive digital billboards and red neon signs.
